full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Implementing the MK algorithm from Table 3
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Implement the MK Motif Discovery algorithm from Table 3 of the paper 'Exact Discovery of Time Series Motifs' in Python using numpy. Include brute force (Table 1) and early abandoning baseline. Add detailed comments referencing the paper's pseudocode line numbers.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided the initial Python implementation of all three algorithms with line-by-line annotations to the paper's pseudocode.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified each line against Table 1 and Table 3. Checked that Lemma 1 (termination condition) and Lemma 2 (completeness) are correctly implemented by inspect the offset/abandon logic.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Restructured the code into separate functions, added distance computation counters, and added pruned_count tracking that the LLM did not include.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: In my early abandoning implementation, should I compare the running sum against best_so_far or best_so_far squared?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Clarified that we should compare squared sums against squared best-so-far to avoid taking square roots at each step, matching Section 2 of the paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Confirmed by re-reading Section 2: 'we work here with the squared Euclidean distance because we can avoid having to take square roots at each of the n steps.'

top_5_prompts.prompt: Implement the MK Motif Discovery algorithm from Table 3 in Python using numpy.
top_5_prompts.why_important: This was the core implementation prompt. The resulting code needed significant verification and modification but provided the structural skeleton for all three algorithms.

top_5_prompts.prompt: In my early abandoning implementation, should I compare the running sum against best_so_far or best_so_far squared?
top_5_prompts.why_important: This caught a subtle but critical implementation detail that would have produced incorrect early abandoning behavior.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for this task.
